visaRequirements.notes: US passport holders get 90 days visa-free. Register with JNTO optional. No ESTA equivalent needed.
90 days visa-free in Schengen area. ETIAS electronic authorization launches 2025 (~€7, apply online).
Same 90-day Schengen allowance. France + Italy together count toward the 90-day limit.
US passport holders get 60 days visa-free on arrival (extended from 30 in 2024). Extendable once at immigration office for 30 more days.
90 days in Schengen area. All Schengen travel (France, Italy, Spain) counts as one 90-day allowance.
